# WB Roofing & Siding

> Roofing Contractor serving Troy, NY and surrounding areas. WB Roofing & Siding provides quality roofer services in Troy, NY. Licensed, insured, and locally trusted.

## Key Facts
- Business: WB Roofing & Siding
- Category: Roofing Contractor
- Location: Serving Troy, NY, Troy, NY
- Phone: (518) 833-4473
- Email: contact@wb-roofing-siding.com
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 127 reviews
- Years in business: 1
- Jobs completed: 50

## Services
- [Roof Repair](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/roofer/wb-roofing-siding//services/roof-repair/): Expert roof repair and patching for leaks, storm damage, and wear.
- [Roof Installation](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/roofer/wb-roofing-siding//services/roof-install/): New roof installation and full replacement using quality materials.
- [Gutters](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/roofer/wb-roofing-siding//services/gutter/): Gutter installation, repair, cleaning, and downspout solutions.
- [Roof Inspection](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/roofer/wb-roofing-siding//services/inspection/): Thorough roof inspection and assessment with written reports.
- [Siding](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/roofer/wb-roofing-siding//services/siding/): Siding repair and installation to protect and beautify your home.
- [Emergency Roofing](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/roofer/wb-roofing-siding//services/emergency-roofer/): Emergency roof tarp and repair after storms or sudden damage.

## Frequently Asked Questions
- **Do you offer free estimates?** Yes, we provide free, no-obligation estimates for all roofer services.
- **Are you licensed and insured?** Absolutely. We are fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your protection.
- **What areas do you serve?** We serve Troy, NY and surrounding communities.
- **How quickly can you respond?** We offer same-day and 24/7 emergency service for urgent issues.
- **Do you guarantee your work?** Yes, we stand behind every job with a 100% satisfaction guarantee.
